items.name_en: In Stock Chane🌱Vintage Backpack
items.name_cn:
In Stock Chane🌱Vintage Backpack
To be honest, this is a vintage backpack that can be passed down for generations!Classic double C logo, quilted pattern paired with gold metal, leather chain strap, full of texture. The lambskin is soft and delicate, you can't help but want to own and cherish it!It can be used in all four seasons and suits any style💃It must be in your handbag collection
Dimensions 21 10 20.5cm
Number A2210 Large
Lambskin Black

items.name_en: In Stock Chane🎶Vintage Double C Backpack Cowhide Ball Print
items.name_cn:
In Stock Chane🎶Vintage Double C Backpack Cowhide Ball Print
The highlight of this bag is its large double C logo, rare, niche and special ❤️
No need to worry about matching bags, the design is simple and elegant, the cowhide pebbled texture is very durable. Huge capacity, built-in small pocket is thoughtful, and the weight is nice too. Dimensions Length 31 Width 11 Height 34
A2213

items.name_en: In Stock Chanel vintage Victoria Beckham Backpack Limited Edition Lambskin Black
items.name_cn:
In Stock Chanel vintage Victoria Beckham Backpack Limited Edition Lambskin Black
Chanel jumbo Victoria Beckham backpack. The backpack version of the Victoria Beckham bag is very special, with large double-C logos that are cool and eye-catching, very stylish💃 It's hard to run into someone with the same bag. It has a strong vintage feel, with an internal zipper and strong practicality. A bag suitable for both personal use and collection.
Size 28.8.20cm
Number A2219 Backpack

In Stock Chanel✔️Vintage Pre-owned Black Calfskin
The CF Grandma's Heirloom is here! The most classic vintage CF black calfskin paired with quilted pattern + gold hardware, a timeless classic flap 💅 rich vintage charm~ really so heart-fluttering, twist lock closure with sliding chain, shoulder or crossbody switchable, perfect capacity, super versatile for daily wear! In Stock Chanel✨ New Pearlized Apricot CF Chain Clutch Bag Imported Cowhide Diamond Hardware
Classic pearlized apricot new color, cowhide with caviar texture, light apricot
Twist closure with a sliding chain, easily switch between shoulder and crossbody. The bag looks very exquisite, stylish and versatile. This pink-gold color really grabs attention🤩 A mix of girly and luxurious, paired with light gold hardware, it looks very queenly💋

items.name_en: In Stock COCO HANDLE MINI
items.name_cn:
In Stock COCO HANDLE MINI
A killer style!! This handle version of the COCO HANDLE mini is even softer and cuter~ It has more charm than the classic size! The wrist chain embellishment elevates the overall look to a luxurious level! The chain is detachable, really thoughtful~ Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody. I really love it more the more I look at it❤️ Fits an iPhone X sized phone
Size:24cm.99406

items.name_en: In Stock: Chanel✨ New Champagne Gold CF
items.name_cn:
In Stock: Chanel✨ New Champagne Gold CF
Glistening and shiny 🤩 Absolutely stunning! Classic silhouette + Champagne gold, sophisticated! Shimmers in different lights, beautiful from every angle. Special craftsmanship used; though it's lambskin, you don't need to worry about scratches as this leather is very durable. Versatile style, suitable for both casual and formal wear.
Size 25cm,
Number 112 Gold Pearl Lambskin
